name: Team Member Workload Report
query:
SELECT 
    t.assigned_to AS team_member,
    u.full_name,
    COUNT(*) AS total_tasks,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_tasks,
    ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100, 2) AS completion_percentage
FROM `tabTask` t
LEFT JOIN `tabUser` u ON u.name = t.assigned_to
GROUP BY t.assigned_to, u.full_name
ORDER BY completion_percentage DESC;
